data.body: EPIC 6982 CLOSED (capstone). Genuine gate-passing close (completion-verifier PASS exit 0, signed, NOT force-closed). All 13 children closed: E1,E2,E3,E5,E6,R1-R7,d8a5. Reconciled ACs (originals kept verbatim for audit): (1) advisory-first pivot R1/R3/R4 (ship advisory + <=8-run sanity + d8a5 zero-LLM dogfood + documented promotion gate) replacing rejected batch-eval gate; (2) E2/E3 rescoped — deterministic harness/corpus WIP, ~$3-5K batch baseline permanently rejected on cost + superseded by d8a5 #798, mining confirmed dead (~4 vs ~200 plan-v3 baselines); (3) kappa descoped — E1 finding-adjudication corpus ~79% contaminated, parked as idea e59d, outcome corpus frozen+committed. All 3 pivots operator-approved. Epic-close guardrail VALIDATED: stale-worktree close failed from cal-e2 -> re-ran from throwaway /tmp worktree at origin/main -> PASS, main checkout + operator WIP untouched. PROCESS FIX in flight: docs-only change (af1b38c4) documenting post-merge close discipline (fast-forward your worktree, never the main checkout) — NO code/close-syntax per operator. Operator WIP (AGENTS.md + writing-a-passing-plan.md) preserved in git stash@{0} + /tmp/operator_wip_backup/.
